title: Smoky Monsoon Paleo Turky
description: A fermented and silky monsoon Saudi Arabian dish featuring smoked turkey neck in a paleo-friendly recipe.
instructions: Mix the ginger paste, garlic paste, coconut aminos, lime juice, olive oil, smoked paprika, cayenne pepper, and thyme leaves in a bowl to create a marinade.
Rub the turkey neck with the marinade, ensuring it is well coated on all sides. Cover with plastic wrap or place in a sealable bag and refrigerate for at least 6 hours or overnight.
Preheat your smoker to medium heat (around 225°F - 300°F).
Season the turkey neck with salt and black pepper before placing it on the smoker rack. Smoke until fully cooked, approximately 1 hour per pound of turkey neck at this temperature.
Remove from smoke and let rest for about 10 minutes before slicing into pieces.
Serve as a main dish or side dish.
